revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[島根県]][[隠岐の島町]]内にある[[建築物]]に関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:おきのしまちようのけんちくふつ}} {{座標一覧}} [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
==Local Content== {{citation needed|おきのしまちようのけんちくふつ}} {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|ja|Category:隠岐の島町の建築物|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:隠岐の島町の建築物|version=61628239}} [[Category:Architecture by Municipality in Shimane Prefecture]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Okinoshima, Shimane]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]] [[ja:Category:隠岐の島町の建築物]] [[ko:Category:오키노시마정의 건축물]] [[sn:Category:Architecture of Okinoshima Town]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Tamawakasu-no-mikoto Shrine]] [[sn:隠岐の島町の建築物]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[建築物]]" to "[[Building]]s"

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q27673840)

Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Qq but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
